places.name: Varanasi
places.description: A spiritual city on the banks of the River Ganges, known for its sacred ghats and ancient temples. It is one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world.

places.name: Jaipur
places.description: The capital of Rajasthan, famously known as the 'Pink City'. It is renowned for its stunning forts, royal palaces, and vibrant markets.

places.name: Delhi
places.description: The capital city of India, a sprawling metropolis that blends historical Mughal-era landmarks with modern urban development.

places.name: Goa
places.description: A state on the western coast of India, famous for its beautiful beaches, vibrant nightlife, Portuguese architecture, and laid-back atmosphere.

places.name: Manali
places.description: A high-altitude resort town nestled in the Himalayas, popular for its stunning mountain views, adventure sports, and as a honeymoon destination.
